instruction:
$100$ blocks are selected from a crate containing $33$ blocks of each of the following dimensions:
$$$13 \times 17 \times 21, 13 \times 17 \times 37, 13 \times 21 \times 37 , \,\,\, \text{and} \,\,\, 17 \times 21 \times 37: $$$
The chosen blocks are stacked on top of each other (one per cross section) forming a tower of height $h$ . Compute the number of possible values of $h$ :

Options:
A. 595
B. 592
C. 594
D. 597
E. 598
F. 591
G. 599
H. 593
I. 596
J. 590
